hero.subtitle: React · Python · FastAPI · Generative AI · Zero Trust

about.title: About me
about.desc: Lead Full Stack Architect with over 8 years creating high-impact digital products. Specialized in PWAs, serverless architectures, Zero Trust, and Generative AI.

nsl.title: Non-Stop Learning
nsl.desc: Educational PWA with 9 pedagogical engines, conversational AI tutor, and gamification.
nsl.detail: Non-Stop Learning (NSL) is an adaptive learning platform. Featuring 9 pedagogical engines and a voice tutor, integrating gamification and Stripe payments.
nsl.problem: High dropout rate in traditional platforms due to lack of personalization and real-time feedback.
nsl.solution: PWA architecture with low-latency AI processing that increased retention and session time by 15%.

finance.title: Smart Finance Pro
finance.desc: Expense tracking with real-time dashboard, automatic categorization, and savings goals.
finance.detail: Personal finance PWA with interactive real-time dashboards and categorization that learns from user patterns.
finance.problem: Lack of visibility over capital leaks and the friction of manually categorizing expenses in spreadsheets.
finance.solution: Predictive Zero Trust dashboard with automated categorization that identifies spending patterns instantly.

autoflow.title: AutoFlow
autoflow.desc: Enterprise automation with n8n and AI, 400+ connectors, and smart reports.
autoflow.detail: Visual automation solution for SMBs. Combines n8n with generative AI for executive reporting.
autoflow.problem: Operational bottlenecks in SMBs due to repetitive manual tasks and disconnected systems.
autoflow.solution: Orchestrated ecosystem with +400 connectors and AI agents that drastically reduce routine manual work.

insightai.title: InsightAI
insightai.desc: Executive dashboard with natural language queries and automatic visualization.
insightai.detail: Allows executives to query enterprise data in natural language. An SQL Agent translates the question to SQL.
insightai.problem: Executives depending on technical teams to extract simple metrics, delaying decision making.
insightai.solution: Conversational RAG interface where the executive asks in plain text and gets dynamic visualizations in seconds.

docbrain.title: DocBrain
docbrain.desc: Enterprise RAG chatbot that reasons over internal documentation with source citations.
docbrain.detail: Corporate RAG chatbot that loads PDFs, Word, and Markdown. Employees get answers with citations to sources.
docbrain.problem: Loss of productive hours searching for specific policies, processes, or data in corporate document silos.
docbrain.solution: Semantic search engine (pgvector + LlamaIndex) that delivers exact answers, citing the source page and document.

contact.desc: Whether you need to solve bottlenecks with Artificial Intelligence, design robust architectures from scratch, or lead a technical team to the next level.
contact.desc2: and let's design the architecture to make it a reality.

autoflow.desc: Design powerful workflows with n8n, powered by AI. Connect your services, automate processes, and delegate tasks to the smart assistant.
autoflow.metricsDesc: Monitor the performance of your automations
autoflow.flowDesc: Visualize and execute automations with a single click
autoflow.step1: Webhook received: new lead from landing page
autoflow.step5: Transforming payload to API v2 format
autoflow.chatDesc: Chat with the AI to create, debug, and optimize flows
autoflow.connectorsDesc: Integrate your favorite services. Click to connect/disconnect.
autoflow.footerDesc: Enterprise automation with n8n · AI · Webhooks
autoflow.botWelcome: Systems online. I am **AutoFlow Nexus**, your AI orchestrator. I am ready to process your requirements, synthesize pipelines, and execute nodes in real time. What architecture are we building today?
autoflow.botResp1:
Analyzing request semantics... **Pipeline detected: Lead Capture and Nurturing**.

I have synthesized the following optimal architecture:
1. **Trigger:** Dynamic Webhook (Active listening)
2. **Processor:** Regex Filter for email/name
3. **Action:** SMTP Integration (Welcome)
4. **Notification:** Slack/Teams Ping

Deploying nodes to the visual environment. Starting simulation in 3, 2, 1...
autoflow.botResp2:
Accessing integrations registry... 

Your current ecosystem has valid OAuth authorizations for **Gmail** and **Slack**. You can manage tokens and Webhooks directly in the Connectors console. Do you want to provision a new API Key?
autoflow.botRespDefault:
Received. Analyzing your instruction using NLP...

As your AI orchestrator, I can structure complex flows, debug payloads in real time, or suggest performance optimizations. Please be more specific or use one of the quick commands.

insightai.heroDesc: Connect your databases in minutes, analyze key metrics, and generate executive reports interacting directly in natural language.
insightai.aiWelcome:
Hello! I am InsightAI, your virtual CFO. To see the magic in action, I invite you to try the **quick actions** below, or you can type your own query.

Discover how I generate charts and pivot tables in seconds based on your data.
insightai.aiWelcomeAnalysis: PostgreSQL connection established successfully. Ready to process queries.
insightai.aiDemo: This is an interactive demonstration. In a production environment, **InsightAI** will connect directly to your Database to analyze this custom query and generate financial reports in real time.
insightai.aiDemoAnalysis: Active Demo Mode. Client database connection required for custom queries.
insightai.aiTopProducts: Here are the top 3 best-selling products of the week. **Laptop Pro X1** remains strongly in the lead.
insightai.aiTopProductsAnalysis: Query executed: SELECT name, sales FROM products ORDER BY sales DESC LIMIT 3
insightai.aiChurn: Attention: I have detected 3 corporate clients with a decreasing purchase pattern indicating churn risk.
insightai.aiChurnAnalysis: Churn Risk predictive algorithm (XGBoost) detected anomalies in order frequency.
insightai.aiSales: Sales have remained solid, showing a **+12.3%** growth compared to the previous month.
insightai.aiSalesAnalysis: Month-over-month delta calculation completed over revenue time series.
insightai.repPreviewEmpty: Configure and press "Generate with AI" to see the interactive report.
insightai.repPreviewDesc: Total sales for the month reached $847,320 MXN (+12.3% vs previous month). The star product was Laptop Pro X1 with 245 units.
insightai.moreHelp: How else can I help you? Try another quick action.
insightai.chatFooter: GPT-4o · LangChain SQL Agent · Connected to PostgreSQL
insightai.connSub: InsightAI connects to any DB in under 2 minutes
insightai.connDesc: InsightAI is analyzing this database in real time. All queries you make in the chat will use artificial intelligence to convert your natural language into SQL queries, securely querying these tables directly.
insightai.expQuery: "What was my best-selling product this week?"
insightai.expDesc: Analyzing your sales database for the week of May 18-24, 2026, I identified that Laptop Pro X1 was the product with the highest volume, totaling 47 units (+23% vs previous week), driven by equipment renewal from CorpTech SA.
insightai.expChartTitle: Daily sales — Laptop Pro X1 (This week)
insightai.connDesc4: Backend as a Service with PostgreSQL

docbrain.heroDesc: Connect your manuals, contracts, and policies. Get precise answers with the exact page as the source. Never search through folders again.
docbrain.libSubtitle: Drag documents or click to upload
docbrain.uploadTitle: Drop your PDF, Word, or TXT here
docbrain.uploadModalDesc: In a real production environment, when uploading a document, DocBrain automatically runs the following AI pipeline in seconds:
docbrain.step1Desc: Reads text from PDFs, Word docs, or scans, structuring the information.
docbrain.step2Desc: Intelligently divides the document preserving the context of each paragraph.
docbrain.step3Desc: Converts text into mathematical vectors using advanced AI models.
docbrain.step4Desc: Stores vectors in a specialized database (e.g. pgvector) for instant search.
docbrain.chatSubtitle: The AI answers only with information from YOUR documents. Always cited.
docbrain.chatDisclaimer1: DocBrain answers only with info from your documents. Never hallucinates.
docbrain.footerText: Enterprise RAG with LlamaIndex · pgvector · GPT-4o
docbrain.demoModalDesc: This is an interactive demo of DocBrain. Advanced policy and access role management requires connection to your database and Active Directory.
docbrain.aiWelcome:
DocBrain Core Engine v2.4 initialized. I have processed and indexed 100% of your corporate document repository.

Experience the power of semantic search by executing one of the **quick actions** below, or ask a complex query in natural language.

I will generate deterministic answers by extracting actionable insights and attaching the exact citation from the original source.
docbrain.aiFallback: Excellent question! Since this is a demo, your real documents are not yet connected. In a production environment with your own account, DocBrain would semantically search your entire database and give you the exact answer citing the reference page.
docbrain.q1Text: According to the HR Manual 2026, employees are entitled to the following vacation days based on their seniority:
docbrain.q1CitaFrag: "The vacation period is determined in accordance with the Federal Labor Law, increasing by two working days for each subsequent year of service, up to 22 days."
docbrain.q2Text: The onboarding process for new employees consists of 3 main phases during the first month:
q2List: Day 1: Welcome, equipment handover and accesses.
docbrain.q2CitaFrag: "The success of the new talent depends on the first month. The three phases (Day 1, Week 1, Month 1) guarantee total immersion in the corporate culture."
docbrain.q3Text: IT security policies establish strict guidelines for the use of corporate equipment:
q3List: Mandatory use of VPN on public networks.
docbrain.q3CitaFrag: "All assigned devices must comply with standard security regulations: automatic lock (5 min), active VPN outside the office and restriction of third-party software."
docbrain.q4Text: The new products added to the Q1 2026 catalog are:
docbrain.q4CitaFrag: "The new line of peripherals includes the mechanical RGB keyboard v2 with improved switches, the curved 34-inch monitor with 5K resolution and the USB-C hub with 7 ports."
docbrain.citation: The vacation period is determined according to the Federal Labor Law, increasing two working days for each subsequent year of service, up to 22 days.
